workstream.title: X Harness OSS parity for sns-agent

canonical_boundaries.old_task_files_policy: Do not recreate tasks/, agent-output/, or feature/* task-management docs.

owns: bounded code changes for one active ticket
UI review findings only when ui_review is required

tickets.title: Align X account model and credentials
tickets.summary: Map X Harness x_accounts semantics onto sns-agent social_accounts without breaking multi-platform accounts.
scope: Represent X OAuth 2.0 and OAuth 1.0a credential fields in encrypted credentials.
Document credential shapes for posting, media upload, DM, follow, like, repost, and search operations.
Keep social_accounts as the shared account table unless implementation proves a separate X extension table is required.
acceptance: X credential type is explicit and covered by unit tests.
Existing account connect flow still works.
Downstream tickets can request OAuth 1.0a-only operations without guessing credential fields.

tickets.title: Build typed X API v2 client surface
tickets.summary: Expand the minimal X HTTP client into typed methods needed by X Harness parity.
scope: Add typed methods for users/me, tweets create/delete/get/search, mentions, liking users, retweeted by, followers, following, DM conversations/events, like, repost, reply, and quote lookup.
Normalize X API errors and rate-limit metadata.
Keep fetch injectable for deterministic tests.
acceptance: Each client method has request/response tests with mocked fetch.
Rate limit and 429 responses expose structured retry metadata.
No route/usecase calls raw X endpoints directly.

tickets.title: Implement X post media thread and quote publishing parity
tickets.summary: Bring X publishing beyond single text tweets.
scope: Support media upload or documented pre-upload handoff for images/videos.
Support thread creation as ordered tweet chain.
Support quote tweet creation.
Preserve generic post model and add X-specific extra params where needed.
acceptance: X provider declares threadPost true when implemented.
Unit tests cover text, media, thread, quote, and validation failures.
Generic LINE/Instagram provider behavior is unchanged.

tickets.title: Harden scheduled post parity
tickets.summary: Ensure scheduled X posts match X Harness behavior while using sns-agent's generic scheduler.
scope: Verify scheduled X posts can publish all XHP-003 post variants.
Expose cancellation/listing parity through API, SDK, CLI, and UI.
Record failure/retry state clearly.
acceptance: Scheduler test covers X post variants.
Failed X API calls preserve retryable vs terminal error state.
Schedule cancellation remains idempotent.

tickets.title: Implement engagement gate domain API and processor
tickets.summary: Add X Harness secret-reply engagement gates with reply-trigger first.
scope: Add engagement_gates and engagement_gate_deliveries schema/repositories/domain types.
Add CRUD API under /api/engagement-gates.
Add processor that checks replies via since_id, evaluates like/repost/follow requirements, and records delivery dedupe.
Support action types mention_post, dm, and verify_only.
acceptance: Gate CRUD endpoints exist and are protected by RBAC.
Processor is idempotent per gate/user.
Reply-trigger path uses last_reply_since_id.
Legacy like/repost trigger can be represented even if lower priority.

tickets.title: Add gate verify API and LINE Harness handoff
tickets.summary: Expose X Harness verify semantics for cross-platform campaigns.
scope: Add GET /api/engagement-gates/:id/verify?username=... response with eligible and condition booleans.
Support delivery tokens and consumed_at for external reward redemption.
Store optional LINE Harness URL, API key reference, tag, and scenario fields.
Do not leak secret API keys in responses.
acceptance: Verify API is callable by configured auth path.
Response shape matches X Harness eligible/conditions contract.
Token consumption is idempotent and auditable.

tickets.title: Build campaign wizard API and dashboard flow
tickets.summary: Create the post -> conditions -> LINE -> preview wizard from X Harness.
scope: Add campaign create API that composes post, gate, verify, and optional LINE handoff.
Add dashboard wizard with preview and validation states.
Persist enough campaign metadata for editing and analytics.
acceptance: Wizard can create a draft campaign without publishing.
Wizard can publish/schedule when permissions allow.
UI review artifacts include desktop and mobile screenshots.

tickets.title: Implement X reply management
tickets.summary: Support mentions/replies, one-click like/repost, reply, and own reply visibility.
scope: Implement X provider listThreads/getMessages/sendReply for mentions and reply threads.
Add like/repost engagement actions from dashboard/API.
Persist engagement_actions for dedupe and display.
acceptance: Inbox can list X mentions/replies.
Reply send records outbound message.
Like/repost actions are idempotent.

tickets.title: Implement X DM management
tickets.summary: Add X DM conversations, history, and send support.
scope: Map X DM conversations/events into generic conversation_threads and messages.
Implement send DM through X provider.
Handle missing DM permissions clearly.
acceptance: DM list/detail/send are covered by mocked provider tests.
Permission failures produce actionable API errors.
UI distinguishes reply threads from DM conversations.

tickets.title: Persist and act on quote tweets
tickets.summary: Detect quote tweets, store them beyond API search windows, and allow reply actions.
scope: Add quote_tweets schema/repository/usecase.
Add processor to discover quotes for tracked source tweets.
Expose list/detail/action endpoints and dashboard view.
acceptance: Quote tweets are deduped by source tweet and quote id.
Stored quote data includes author profile fields needed by UI.
Dashboard can trigger reply/like/repost where permissions allow.

tickets.title: Add X follower repository sync and segments
tickets.summary: Store X followers with profile and relationship state.
scope: Add followers schema/repository/domain types.
Add sync usecase for followers/following.
Represent is_following, is_followed, unfollowed_at, and metadata.
acceptance: Follower sync upserts current followers and marks unfollowed rows.
Follower list supports account and tag filters after XHP-012.
Repository tests cover unique account/user constraints.

tickets.title: Add follower tags
tickets.summary: Implement X Harness tag model for followers and segments.
scope: Add tags and follower_tags schema/repositories/usecases.
Add CRUD API for tags.
Add attach/detach endpoints for followers.
acceptance: Tags are unique per X account.
Follower tag attach/detach is idempotent.
Follower list can filter by tag.

tickets.title: Add follower snapshot analytics
tickets.summary: Track daily follower counts and expose 7/30 day deltas.
scope: Add follower_snapshots schema/repository/usecase.
Add scheduled snapshot job.
Add analytics API and dashboard chart.
acceptance: Analytics response includes current count, 7 day delta, 30 day delta, and time series.
Snapshot job is idempotent per account/day.
Chart renders with empty, loading, and populated states.

tickets.title: Implement step sequences
tickets.summary: Add delayed mention/DM step delivery for enrolled X users.
scope: Add step_sequences, step_messages, and step_enrollments schema/repositories/usecases.
Add sequence CRUD and enrollment APIs.
Add scheduler processor for due steps.
acceptance: Enrolled users advance through due steps.
Cancelled/completed enrollments do not send.
Delivery uses stealth controls from XHP-020 when configured.

tickets.title: Add X usage analytics dimensions
tickets.summary: Extend generic usage to support endpoint and gate-level X cost views.
scope: Tag usage records with gate id or feature metadata where available.
Add gate-level usage aggregation.
Expose endpoint-level and gate-level dashboard tables.
acceptance: Usage API can return platform, endpoint, and gate-level aggregates.
Existing usage dashboard remains compatible.
Budget checks can still evaluate endpoint scope.

tickets.title: Review staff and API key parity
tickets.summary: Confirm sns-agent users and agent identities cover X Harness staff expectations.
scope: Map owner/admin/editor/viewer to existing roles.
Map API key scoped permissions to agent identities and RBAC.
Only add schema or API changes if a parity gap remains.
acceptance: Documented role mapping exists.
Any missing scope has a failing test before implementation.
Existing admin/user settings behavior is preserved.

tickets.title: Add X Harness MCP server package
tickets.summary: Expose X operations through MCP tools equivalent to the reference.
scope: Create package for MCP server or adapter using @sns-agent/sdk.
Expose tools for posts, DM, users, followers, gates, campaigns, staff, step sequences, and usage.
Document environment variables and local setup.
acceptance: MCP server starts locally with API URL and API key env vars.
Tool names cover the X Harness 30-tool surface or documented equivalent names.
Tool tests validate argument schemas.

tickets.title: Extend SDK with X parity resources
tickets.summary: Add SDK resources for X-specific parity APIs.
scope: Add typed resources for engagement gates, followers, tags, analytics, campaigns, quote tweets, and step sequences as they land.
Keep generic resources stable.
Add examples for agent usage.
acceptance: SDK methods match API response DTOs.
MCP ticket can consume SDK without raw fetch.
Backward compatibility tests for existing SDK methods pass.

tickets.title: Build X-specific dashboard parity shell
tickets.summary: Add dashboard navigation and pages for X Harness parity features.
scope: Add pages/nav for gates, campaigns, followers, tags, analytics, quotes, and sequences.
Keep existing generic posts/inbox/usage pages intact.
Use existing design system and responsive layout patterns.
acceptance: Each page handles loading, empty, error, and populated states.
Mobile and desktop screenshots pass UI review.
No text overlap or nested-card layout regressions.

tickets.title: Add stealth delivery controls
tickets.summary: Implement jitter, rate limits, backoff, and template variation for automation safety.
scope: Add configurable per-account/per-gate hourly and daily limits.
Add jittered delivery scheduling instead of immediate burst sending.
Add template variation helper.
Stop or back off on 429 responses.
acceptance: Gate processor never sends more than configured rate limits.
429 response prevents additional sends for the affected gate/account until retry window.
Template variation is deterministic in tests when seeded.

tickets.title: Add optional Cloudflare Worker D1 deployment path
tickets.summary: Provide a self-host path comparable to X Harness OSS without replacing local Node development.
scope: Assess whether apps/api can run on Workers or whether a worker adapter app is cleaner.
Add D1-compatible migration/deploy docs and config.
Keep existing local SQLite workflow working.
acceptance: Documented deploy path exists for Cloudflare.
Local dev remains unchanged.
D1 schema is generated or documented from Drizzle migrations.
